title: PRIMA State
description: Project Registration, Indexing & Management Assistant — state file schema v1.0.0

version.description: Semantic version of the state schema

type.description: personal = owner's main workspace, client = client workspace, internal = non-client project

githubRepo.description: GitHub repo in org/repo format (e.g. 'acme-org/acme-biz-os'). Empty string if no remote.

id.description: Stable eternal ID. Format: P + 3-digit zero-padded number (P001–P999). Never reused, never changes meaning. Flexible numbering formats available with PRIMA Plugin.

status.description: Traffic light: green=in-progress, amber=paused, red=overdue, grey=archived

stoppedAt.description: Where work stopped on this project. Set by /night, cleared when project is next worked on.

lastAction.description: Last completed action on this project. Set by /night.

pausedReason.description: Required when status is 'paused'. Why is this on hold?

category.description: Primary project classification. One per project. Stored lowercase, displayed title case.

tags.description: Freeform tags for cross-cutting concerns. Seed list: automation, integration, compliance, training, reporting, procurement, hr, crm, content, strategy, website, events, infrastructure, documentation, customer-support. Custom tags permitted.

path.description: Relative path to project folder within workspace

companyName.description: Client company/organisation name. Required for client category projects.

contacts.description: Contact names associated with this project. Full contact details stored in PRIMA CRM if installed. Required (min 1) for client category projects.

nextProjectNumber.description: The next number to use when creating a project. Incremented after each /newproject. Combined with projectNumbering config in integrations.json to generate the full ID.

summary.description: 1-2 sentence human-readable summary of the session

projectsWorked.description: Project IDs touched during this session

recentWork.description: 3-5 key activities from the most recent session. Replaced on each /night.

selectedCalendars.description: Calendar IDs to query during /day. Empty array if no calendar integration.
